jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - NIIT - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
NIIT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIIT:
NIIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT!
